dafrjulia 0.1.1.9000

dafrjulia: R Interface to the Julia 'DataAxesFormats' Package

Source: R/dafrjulia-package.R
dafrjulia-package.Rd

An R interface to 'DataAxesFormats.jl' https://github.com/tanaylab/DataAxesFormats.jl, a 'Julia' https://julialang.org/ package providing a uniform interface for accessing multi-dimensional data arranged along arbitrary axes. This package generalizes and extends 'AnnData'-like functionality, supporting both 1D and 2D data, multiple data modalities, and efficient memory management. 'dafrjulia' enables R users to create, read, modify, and analyze complex biological datasets such as single-cell data with multiple modalities (RNA-seq, ATAC-seq, etc.). The package implements efficient memory management strategies and provides a seamless interface between R and 'Julia' for handling large-scale biological data.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/

  • https://github.com/tanaylab/dafrjulia

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/tanaylab/dafrjulia/issues
